calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Kevin P. Urbatsch appearing via zoom for Petitioner CPT Institute.

The Court noted that no one is appearing for the conservator and questions the paralegal charges for appearing at the hearing. Mr. Urbatsch stated that there was an issue with their internal billing system, the paralegals help the attorneys prepare for appearances and that they did the work. The first account and report of trustee etc., was taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.
